description:
When evaluating this position:

- More points are better than fewer ( = fewer points for black are better than more points for black here)

- Only when the points are same, more ko threats are better than fewer ko threats.
sgf:

Lets cooperate. We will start on the right side and I will show you the best you can do there. Play the moves I show you; start at A please.FORCE]AP[goproblems];W[ma];B[mb]LB[ka:B]C[Good, black could not cut your stone - his own two were too weak! Play at B now. Note that playing at M19 is not very good idea.FORCE];W[ka];B[na]LB[la:C]C[Black could not play M19 as you would cut him at P17! Now you should protect your stone at C.FORCE];W[la];B[ob]C[Ok, the first part is over. Now its your turn - show me the second best solution please!Cou cannot BEGIN at G19 (as that is the best solution)]
